item.name: Approve a ban appeal (requires admin auth)

request.description: Marks the appeal as APPROVED, lifts the associated ban and creates an unban moderation action. Requires admin authentication.

response.name: Invalid appeal id or appeal already decided

item.name: Deny a ban appeal (requires admin auth)

request.description: Marks the appeal as DENIED and records a moderation action. Requires admin authentication.

response.name: Invalid appeal id or appeal already decided

request.description: Returns ban appeals filtered by `status` query parameter. Defaults to `PENDING`. Requires admin authentication.
Admin-only. Returns bans that are not lifted and not expired.
Generate and persist a fresh daily digest immediately. Intended for administrative use to refresh the digest on-demand. Requires admin authentication.
Dismiss or action (hide) a report. When actioned, the target post/thread is hidden and the report status becomes ACTIONED. Requires admin authentication.
Create a ban record and mark the user as banned. Optionally include an `until` date or `reportId` reference. Requires admin authentication.
Lift bans for a user and update their banned status. Returns who performed the unban and the updated user summary. Requires admin authentication.

exec: console.log("Failed to extract accessToken or wrong structure");
console.log("Failed to extract accessToken or wrong structure");

request.description: Submit the refresh token to invalidate it. After logout, that token can no longer be used to obtain new access tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for new access and refresh tokens. Revoked tokens are rejected.

item.name: Register a new user with email and password

request.description: Creates a new user account. Email required; username optional (auto-generated from email if omitted). Returns accessToken and refreshToken.

response.name: Invalid input or missing required fields
Email or username already in use

item.name: Submit an appeal for a ban (requires user auth)

request.description: Authenticated users may submit an appeal for their own ban. Creates a pending BanAppeal record.

item.name: Get today's daily digest (requires user auth)

request.description: Retrieve the cached daily digest or generate a new one summarizing top discussions, recent matches, and standings moves. Requires authenticated user.
Returns a list of forum threads associated with a match.

response.name: List of threads for the match

request.description: Returns a match by its ID, including home and away team info.

query.description: Filter by team ID (home or away)

request.description: Returns a list of matches, optionally filtered by status, team, date, season, or matchday.

query.description: Filter by team ID (home or away)

request.description: Upload an image as profile picture. Accepts multipart/form-data with field "file". Replaces existing avatar.
Removes the current user's profile picture.

item.name: Get the latest ban for the current user

request.description: Returns the most recent ban record for the authenticated user, including whether it is still active and any pending appeal.

query.description: Max number of feed items (groups) to return.

request.description: Returns a merged feed with meaningful grouping so many events on the same post/thread do not overwhelm. Posts from followed users are grouped by thread (postCount + up to 5 latest posts). Comments on the user's posts are grouped by parent post (commentCount + up to 5 latest comments). Match updates and team threads remain one item each. Requires authentication.

variable.description: User id of the follower to remove

request.description: Removes the follow relationship so the given user no longer follows the current user. Requires authentication.

variable.description: User id of the follower to remove
User id of the follower to remove

response.name: No such follower (user is not following you)

variable.description: User id of the follower to remove

request.description: Returns users who follow the current user. Sorted by follow time (newest first). Requires authentication.
Returns users that the current user follows. Sorted by follow time (newest first). Requires authentication.
Returns the profile of the user identified by the Bearer token.
Update username, displayName, and/or favorite team. All fields optional.
Closes a poll. Allowed for poll creator or admin.

response.name: Invalid poll id or poll already closed

request.description: Edits an option label/metadata. Not allowed once the poll has votes.
Deletes a poll option. Not allowed once the poll has votes.
Adds a poll option. Not allowed once the poll has votes.
Cast a vote for an option in an open poll. One vote per user per poll.
Returns poll metadata with option/vote counts.
Updates a poll's question and/or deadline. Requires user authentication.

response.name: Invalid poll id or missing poll name

request.description: Deletes a poll by ID. Requires user authentication.
Returns the current content and edit snapshots for a post in chronological order.
Returns replies for a specific post.
Authenticated users can create a reply to a parent post.
Submit a report for a post by id with a short reason. Requires authenticated user.

response.name: Bad request (invalid id or missing reason)

item.name: Translate a post's content to English (requires user auth)

query.description: Numeric ID of a historical edit to translate instead of the current post content

request.description: AI translate a post's content to English. Optionally translate a specific historical edit instead of the current post content. You can also provide a sourceLanguage hint to improve accuracy. Requires authenticated user.

response.name: Translated current post content

item.name: Fetch a single post by id

request.description: Returns post content with author and thread info when visible.
Requires authentication. Only the post owner or an admin may edit, and hidden/closed content is blocked for non-admins.

response.name: Validation error (invalid id or missing content)

request.description: Soft deletes a post by marking it hidden. Requires owner or admin.

item.name: Get matches for a season matchday

request.description: Returns all matches for a given season and matchday.

response.name: List of matches for the matchday

item.name: Get matchday count for a season

request.description: Returns the number of matchdays for a given season.
Returns the standings table for a given season.
Returns a season by its ID, including winner info.
Returns a list of all seasons, ordered by start date descending.
Returns the current standings table for the most recent season (with a current matchday if available).

Creates a new tag. Requires authentication.

Returns a list of all teams.

item.name: Force recomputation of thread sentiment (requires admin auth)

variable.description: Numeric ID of the thread to recompute sentiment for

request.description: This endpont triggers a full recomputation of the thread's overall sentiment and per-team sentiment (when the thread is linked to a match). Access is restricted to authenticated administrators.

variable.description: Numeric ID of the thread to recompute sentiment for

response.name: invalid thread id or malformed parameter

Numeric ID of the thread to recompute sentiment for

item.name: Compute or retrieve cached sentiment summary for a forum thread (requires user auth)

variable.description: Numeric ID of the forum thread

request.description: Computes sentiment for a thread and updates/creates sentiment summary records in the database. If a recent sentiment summary exists (within the TTL window), the cached result is returned instead of recomputing. Requires authenticated user.

variable.description: Numeric ID of the forum thread

item.name: Get user activity over a time period

query.description: Number of days (from today backwards). Ignored if from/to provided.

request.description: Returns daily activity (posts and comments/replies count) for charting. Activity = posts + comments authored by the user. No auth required.

response.name: Activity timeline with daily buckets (postsCount, commentsCount, totalActivity)

item.name: Get posts and replies by user

request.description: Returns posts and replies authored by this user. Includes thread info. Optional limit/offset. No auth required. Hidden posts are excluded.
Returns threads authored by this user. Optional limit/offset for pagination. No auth required.
Returns public profile for a user - username, displayName, avatar, favorite team, counts of followers/following, and counts of threads/posts. No auth required.
